title: Logo rules
lede: How to use each brand mark correctly across every surface — clear space, background contexts, photographs, and the things you must never do.

clearSpace.title: 06.1 — Clear space & minimum size
clearSpace.desc: Reserve clear space around every wordmark equal to the cap-height of its first letter. Below the listed minimum widths, switch to a more legible variant or scale up.

background.title: 06.2 — Background usage
background.desc: Pick the right logo for each background type. The matrix below is the quick reference; the brand grid demonstrates the three core contexts.

photographic.title: 06.3 — Photographic backgrounds
photographic.desc: Always preserve a clear area at least equal to the logo's clear-space rule. If the photo is busy, place the logo on a solid color plate first — never directly on detail.

misuse.title: 06.4 — Misuse
misuse.desc: Never modify the logo. The treatments below all break the brand identity — using filters, transforms, recolors, or re-typesetting are all explicitly disallowed.
misuse.calloutKr: 의문이 있을 경우 KIMES 브랜드팀에 문의하시기 바랍니다.
misuse.calloutEn: When in doubt, contact the KIMES brand team.
